header.accountIdentifierCopiedDescription: Account identifier has been copied to clipboard
header.accountEmailCopiedDescription: Account email has been copied to clipboard

wallets.title: Linked Wallets
wallets.impersonateLinkAlert: You are impersonating a user, so you cannot link a wallet
wallets.impersonateUnlinkAlert: You are impersonating a user, so you cannot unlink a wallet
wallets.unlinkDialogDescription: Are you sure you want to continue unlinking wallet with address {address}?

socialAccounts.title: Social Accounts
socialAccounts.impersonateLinkGithubAlert: You are impersonating a user, so you cannot link a GitHub account
socialAccounts.impersonateUnlinkGithubAlert: You are impersonating a user, so you cannot unlink a GitHub account
socialAccounts.impersonateLinkTwitterAlert: You are impersonating a user, so you cannot link a Twitter account
socialAccounts.impersonateUnlinkTwitterAlert: You are impersonating a user, so you cannot unlink a Twitter account
socialAccounts.unlinkGithubSuccessDescription: Your account has been successfully unlinked.
socialAccounts.unlinkTwitterSuccessDescription: Your account has been successfully unlinked.
socialAccounts.confirmUnlink: Are you sure you want to continue?

contactAccounts.impersonateLinkEmailAlert: You are impersonating a user, so you cannot link an email address
contactAccounts.impersonateUnlinkEmailAlert: You are impersonating a user, so you cannot unlink an email address
contactAccounts.impersonateUnlinkPhoneAlert: You are impersonating a user, so you cannot unlink a phone number
contactAccounts.impersonateLinkPhoneAlert: You are impersonating a user, so you cannot link a phone number
contactAccounts.unlinkPhoneSuccessDescription: Your phone number has been successfully unlinked.
contactAccounts.linkPhoneSuccessDescription: Your phone number has been successfully linked.

contactDetails.title: Contact Details
contactDetails.description: Your contact information for domain registration and account management
contactDetails.unavailable: Privy profile details are unavailable for this session.

emailSubscription.newsletterDescriptionWithEmail: Receive our newsletter and important product updates
emailSubscription.newsletterDescriptionNoEmail: Link an email account to subscribe to updates
emailSubscription.subscribedDescription: You will now receive our newsletter and important updates.
emailSubscription.unsubscribedDescription: You have been removed from our mailing list.

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.description: Manage your API keys for programmatic access
apiKeys.keyPrefixCopiedDescription: API key prefix copied to clipboard

createApiKey.title: Create API Key
createApiKey.description: Create a new API key for programmatic access to your account.
createApiKey.keyTypeHelpPlain: A random API key will be generated. You must save it securely.
createApiKey.keyTypeHelpPublicPrivate: Provide your public key. Sign requests with your private key.
createApiKey.requestTypesHelp: Select which types of requests this API key can make. At least one must be enabled.
createApiKey.allowBrowserRequestsHelp: Requests with an Origin header (e.g., from web browsers)
createApiKey.allowServerRequestsHelp: Requests without an Origin header (e.g., from backend servers)
createApiKey.noRequestTypesWarning: No request types enabled. The key will reject all requests.
createApiKey.allowedIpsHelp: One IP or CIDR per line. Supports IPv4 and IPv6. Leave empty to allow all IPs.
createApiKey.allowedOriginsHelp: One origin per line. Supports wildcards (e.g., https://*.example.com). Leave empty to allow all origins.
createApiKey.privateKeyNotStored: This private key will not be stored. Copy and save it securely.
createApiKey.publicKeyHelpGenerated: This public key was generated from your private key above.
createApiKey.publicKeyHelpManual: Enter your uncompressed secp256k1 public key (65 bytes, 130 hex characters starting with 04), or click "Generate New Keypair" to create one.
createApiKey.noWalletsConnected: No wallets connected. Please connect a wallet first.
createApiKey.createdDescriptionPlain: Your API key has been created. Copy it now - you won't be able to see it again!
createApiKey.createdDescriptionKeypair: Your API key has been created. Make sure you have saved your private key!
createApiKey.saveApiKeyHelp: This is the only time you will see your API key. Please copy it and store it securely.
createApiKey.savePrivateKeyHelp: Make sure you have copied and saved your private key. You will need it to sign API requests.
createApiKey.publicKeyRegisteredHelp: This public key has been registered. Use the private key above to sign your API requests.
createApiKey.enterKeyNameError: Please enter a name for the API key
createApiKey.selectWalletError: Please select a wallet to sign with
createApiKey.keypairGenerated: Keypair generated! Make sure to save your private key.

editApiKey.title: Edit API Key
editApiKey.description: Update request restrictions for {name}. You will sign this change with a linked wallet.
editApiKey.requestTypesHelp: Select which request types this API key can make.
editApiKey.allowBrowserRequestsHelp: Requests with an Origin header, such as web browser calls.
editApiKey.allowServerRequestsHelp: Requests without an Origin header, such as backend calls.
editApiKey.noRequestTypesWarning: No request types are enabled. This key will reject all requests.
editApiKey.allowedIpsHelp: One IP or CIDR per line. Leave empty to allow all IPs.
editApiKey.allowedOriginsHelp: One origin per line. Leave empty to allow all origins.
editApiKey.noWalletsConnected: No wallets connected. Connect a wallet before saving.
editApiKey.selectWalletError: Select a wallet to sign with

revokeApiKey.title: Revoke API Key
revokeApiKey.description: Are you sure you want to revoke this API key? This action cannot be undone and any applications using this key will stop working.
revokeApiKey.noWalletsConnected: No wallets connected. Please connect a wallet first.
revokeApiKey.selectWalletError: Please select a wallet to sign with

loginHistory.title: Login History
loginHistory.description: Recent sign-ins to your Namefi account. If anything here looks unfamiliar, contact support right away.
loginHistory.loadErrorFallback: Please try again in a moment.
loginHistory.emptyHelp: New sessions appear here the next time you sign in.
